description: Component for monitoring a SQL database table for new or updated rows.

connection_string_env_var.label: Connection String Env Var
connection_string_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the SQLAlchemy connection string

table_name.label: Table Name
table_name.description: Name of the table to monitor. Use

watermark_column.label: Watermark Column
watermark_column.description: Column used to detect new/updated rows (e.g.,

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Name of the job to trigger when new rows are detected

id_column.label: Id Column
id_column.description: Primary key column used as the run_key for deduplication.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of rows to return per sensor evaluation

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Optional Dagster resource key providing a pre-configured client.
